commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the memory-core Dream Diary fallback helper and adjacent tests so fallback diary writes use a generic placeholder instead of raw snippets or promotions.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +37. Total +38 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main returns raw snippets/promotions from the fallback helper, and the existing timeout test asserts that raw text is written to DREAMS.md. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the security-versus-fallback-detail compatibility tradeoff, not an automated repair.
